response: {"name":"eCLIP-seq library preparation","description":"Enhanced CLIP (eCLIP) library preparation protocol for mapping RNA-binding protein (RBP)-RNA interactions, involving UV crosslinking, immunoprecipitation, adapter ligation, reverse transcription, and paired-end high-throughput sequencing on Illumina platforms.","data_type":"sequencing","raw_data_source":null,"steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"RNA-binding protein (RBP)-RNA interactions are stabilized by UV crosslinking of live cells.","input_data":"Live cells (e.g., K562, HepG2; typically 10×10^6 or 20×10^6 cells)","output_data":"UV-crosslinked cells with covalently stabilized RBP-RNA complexes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"UV_wavelength":"254 nm","UV_dose":"400 mJ/cm2"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"Cells are lysed in iCLIP lysis buffer and RBP-RNA complexes are partially digested with RNase I.","input_data":"UV-crosslinked cells","output_data":"Cell lysate with fragmented RBP-RNA complexes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"lysis_buffer":"iCLIP lysis buffer","RNase":"RNase I (Ambion)","digestion":"limited/partial"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"RBP-RNA complexes are immunoprecipitated using a specific primary antibody and magnetic beads pre-coupled with a secondary antibody, followed by stringent washes.","input_data":"Cell lysate with fragmented RBP-RNA complexes","output_data":"Immunoprecipitated RBP-RNA complexes on magnetic beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"magnetic_beads":"M-280 Sheep Anti-Rabbit IgG Dynabeads (ThermoFisher Scientific 11204D)","primary_antibody_RBFOX2":"A300-864A lot 002 (Bethyl), 10 ug","primary_antibody_SLBP":"RN045P lot 001 (MBL International), 10 ug","IgG_control":"02-6102 lot 32013 (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","cells_standard":"20×10^6","cells_RNase_variation":"10×10^6 (5 ug antibody)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"RNA ends are dephosphorylated on-bead to prepare for adapter ligation.","input_data":"Immunoprecipitated RBP-RNA complexes on magnetic beads","output_data":"Dephosphorylated RNA ends on magnetic beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme_1":"FastAP (ThermoFisher)","enzyme_2":"T4 PNK (NEB)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"A barcoded RNA adapter is ligated to the 3′ end of RNA fragments on-bead in high PEG8000 concentration to allow wash-away of unincorporated adapter; multiple replicates can be uniquely barcoded and pooled at this step.","input_data":"Dephosphorylated RNA ends on magnetic beads","output_data":"3′ adapter-ligated RNA fragments on magnetic beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"T4 RNA Ligase (NEB)","additive":"high concentration PEG8000","ligation_efficiency":">90%","on_bead":"yes","barcoding":"unique barcodes per replicate/RBP for multiplexing"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":6,"description":"Samples are run on standard protein gels, transferred to nitrocellulose membranes, and the region 75 kDa (~150 nt of RNA) above the protein size is excised and treated with proteinase K to isolate RNA.","input_data":"3′ adapter-ligated RBP-RNA complexes","output_data":"Isolated RNA fragments (~150 nt above protein size)","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"gel_type":"standard protein gel (SDS-PAGE)","transfer_membrane":"nitrocellulose","excision_region":"75 kDa (~150 nt of RNA) above protein size","proteinase_K":"NEB"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":7,"description":"Isolated RNA is reverse transcribed to generate cDNA, then treated with ExoSAP-IT to remove excess oligonucleotides.","input_data":"Isolated RNA fragments","output_data":"cDNA with excess oligonucleotides removed","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"reverse_transcriptase":"AffinityScript (Agilent)","cleanup_enzyme":"ExoSAP-IT (Affymetrix)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":8,"description":"A second DNA adapter containing a random-mer (N5 or N10) at the 5′ end is ligated to the 3′ end of cDNA fragments in high PEG8000 and DMSO to improve efficiency and reduce secondary structure inhibition.","input_data":"cDNA fragments","output_data":"3′ DNA adapter-ligated cDNA library","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"T4 RNA Ligase (NEB)","random_mer_options":"N5 or N10","additives":"high concentration PEG8000, DMSO","adapter_feature":"random-mer (N5 or N10) at 5′ end of adapter"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":9,"description":"Samples are cleaned up with Dynabeads MyOne Silane, an aliquot is used for qPCR to determine optimal PCR cycle number, and the remainder is PCR amplified and size-selected by agarose gel electrophoresis.","input_data":"3′ DNA adapter-ligated cDNA library","output_data":"Size-selected, PCR-amplified eCLIP sequencing library","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"cleanup_beads":"Dynabeads MyOne Silane (ThermoFisher)","qPCR_aliquot":"yes, to determine PCR cycle number","PCR_enzyme":"Q5 (NEB)","size_selection":"agarose gel electrophoresis"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":10,"description":"Libraries are sequenced on Illumina HiSeq 2500 or 4000 as paired-end reads.","input_data":"Size-selected, PCR-amplified eCLIP sequencing library","output_data":"Raw paired-end FASTQ reads","software":"Illumina HiSeq","software_version":"HiSeq 2500 or HiSeq 4000","parameters":{"read_type":"Paired End","read_length_N5":"50
